title: baissea multiflora
intro: Baissea multiflora, also known as the "many-flowered Baissea," is a perennial plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its extracts have been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Baissea multiflora is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its roots can be used to make a tincture for its medicinal properties.
